data.title: Fusaka Upgrade Reignites Confidence in Ethereum, Analysts Eye $3,500 Target
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) is topping talks once again as its Fusaka upgrade goes live and the ETH price returns firmly above the $3,200 mark. After weeks of choppy trading and lingering fear across the broader crypto market, the combination of a major technical overhaul and rising on-chain activity is giving traders a fresh narrative to follow. Related Reading: Eric Trump Says Bitcoin Could Hit $500,000, Stands By ABTC Strategy In the last 24 hours, ETH has climbed around 4–5%, outperforming most large-cap cryptos and reclaiming a key psychological zone near $3,200. Market data shows rising volumes and a noticeable pickup in accumulation from larger holders, even as sentiment indicators still sit in “Fear” territory
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/fusaka-upgrade-reignites-confidence-in-ethereum-analysts-eye-3500-target/

data.title: EU Moves Toward Centralized Crypto Oversight as ESMA Poised to Take Control
data.description:
The European Commission is preparing a proposal that would dramatically reshape how cryptocurrency assets are supervised across the European Union. According to early details expected to be formalized in December 2025, the plan would centralize regulatory authority under the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/eu-moves-toward-centralized-crypto-oversight-as-esma-poised-to-take-control/

data.title: Everything to know about Trump accounts, and how your child can qualify for $1000-$5000
data.description:
Trump is handing out $1,000 in federal seed money to every newborn in America from 2025 through 2028, as long as parents open a government-approved account tied to the stock market. In 2022, just 58% of American households held stocks or bonds, but the wealthiest 1% owned nearly half the total value of those assets. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/everything-to-know-about-trump-accounts/

data.title: BRICS Nations China, India and Brazil Dump $29,000,000,000 in US Treasuries in One Month As Standard Chartered Warns ‘Dedollarization Is Real’
data.description:
Three BRICS countries just slashed their US Treasury holdings. New data from the U. S. Treasury International Capital reporting system shows Brazil, China and India cut their US Treasury holdings by $29 billion in September
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/04/brics-nations-china-india-and-brazil-dump-29000000000-in-us-treasuries-in-one-month-as-standard-chartered-warns-dedollarization-is-real/
